channel.title: Lansin's blog
channel.description: Life is all about experience, adventure, and joy.

item.title: 十一月是收获的季节
item.author: Lansin
item.description: 搬家后的生活很不错， so far so good. 我几乎得到了我两年前幻想中的生活，甚至更好。我有很大的房间，浴室with a bath，甚至我的室友有猫，很可爱也很

item.title: 做人难，做好人更难
item.author: Lansin
item.description: 今天又是心情复杂的一天。最近总是感到混乱和痛苦，好像被什么东西压着，喘不过气来。 说起来有些矛盾，之前觉得挺喜欢A的，但最近帮助她处理工作的事

item.title: 人生总是难以预测
item.author: Lansin
item.description: 苍天啊，我怎么又要搬家了？ 因为房东临时要回都柏林处理私事，我不得不被迫搬走。上周得知这个噩耗后，我就急忙四处找房子。好在我向来是运气好的那方

item.title: New apartment
item.author: Lansin
item.description: Moved to a new apartment now. My new room is bigger now, with a long table facing the sun and the window—that’s exactly what I want. Feel my work efficiency has also improved a little. I really like my roommate. She is so tidy and so organized, so self-disciplined. How can she get up at 7am every day even during the weekends? She lives a healthy lifestyle, a bit like a minimalist.

item.title: 好事发生
item.author: Lansin
item.description: Kim要去东京了 上周Kim告诉我她申请了他们公司的东京岗，目前在等contact的最终阶段。我在都柏林bus上收到她的消息的时候，非常快乐。

item.title: How to understand "wait without hope"
item.author: Lansin

item.title: Random piece in May
item.author: Lansin
item.description: I was seriously ill a while back—worse than I’d ever been. It left me completely drained. But in that broken state, I started seeing life differently. there are so many thoughts I need to get down—scattered, half-formed, urgent. But I haven’t yet found the right order to piece them together. So for now, I’ll just let them spill out, uneven and unfinished. I’ll make sense of them later, when I’m ready to begin the real telling.

item.title: Interview Notes
item.author: Lansin
item.description: I had my second interview last Thursday. The mix of excitement and nervousness was evident, but overall, this experience was better than my first interview. I succeeded in lightening the mood. I noticed positive interactions as they frequently nodded in agreement and took notes during our discussion. Questions I Was Asked: Self-introduction Why this country? Why choose this program? Why this industry? Experience in the master’s program An example of explaining a complex concept Reasons for transitioning to tech Areas for Improvement: Structure in Responses: Even if the question isn’t posed as “Tell me about a time when,” I should use the STAR method.

item.title: Seeking Purpose: Reflections on 'Why'
item.author: Lansin
item.description: Recently, I read some articles by Simon Sinek, recommended by my mentor. My mentor encouraged me to discover my personal “Why Statement.” This concept, introduced by Sinek, emphasizes the driving force behind our actions, our motivations, and our ultimate goals. My mentor’s “Why Statement” was deeply inspiring. Her aspiration is to inspire and empower young individuals, fostering positive change in them, and, over time, in the world at large. However, when I questioned my own “Why Statement,” I found myself at a loss.

item.title: Three Days Without My Laptop
item.author: Lansin
item.description: Three days ago, my laptop, which I’ve used faithfully for nearly six years, ran into technical issues. Upon starting it up, I was met with the message: “To interrupt normal startup, press enter.” Given my affinity for technology, I saw this as an opportunity to delve deeper into the workings of my laptop. After some independent research, I discovered others had faced similar issues. Their solution was to access the BIOS system, adjust the optimized defaults, and then restart.
